song.title: Spring Up O Well
song.lyrics:
[V1] I've got a river of life flowing within me It makes the lame to walk and the blind to see It opens prison doors, sets the captives free I've got a river of life flowing within me
[C] Spring up, O well, within my spirit Rise up and tell, so all can hear it Spring up, O well, so I experience That life abundantly
[V2] I've got a river of life flowing within me it started gushing up when God set me free That I keep the flow is my only plea I've got a river of life springing within me
[V3] Once I call His name there's a flow within It turns me from my day, makes Him Lord again, As my spirit burns, Satan cannot win Calling, "Oh Lord Jesus," keeps the flow withing
